ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farmers" (
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farmer */,
  "farmer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the farmer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the farmer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the farmer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the farm */,
  "farming_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of farming experience */,
  "total_land_area" REAL /* Total area of land owned or leased by the farmer (in acres) */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the farmer registered on the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the farmer's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "optimal_yield" REAL /* Optimal yield per acre for the crop */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Current market price for the crop */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop (e.g., grain, fruit, vegetable) */,
  "growth_period" INTEGER /* Average growth period of the crop (in days) */,
  "water_requirements" REAL /* Average water requirements for the crop (in gallons per acre per day) */,
  "fertilizer_requirements" REAL /* Average fertilizer requirements for the crop (in pounds per acre) */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* Level of disease resistance (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigation_methods" (
  "irrigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irrigation method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the irrigation method */,
  "water_usage" REAL /* Water usage per acre for the method (in gallons) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of implementing the irrigation method */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Average energy consumption for the irrigation method (in kWh per acre per day) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Annual maintenance cost for the irrigation method (in dollars) */,
  "suitable_soil_types" TEXT /* Types of soil suitable for the irrigation method (e.g., clay, loam, sand) */,
  "installation_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of installation (e.g., easy, moderate, difficult) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("irrigation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farmer leasing the land */,
  "lease_area" REAL /* Area of land under lease (in acres) */,
  "lease_cost" REAL /* Cost of the lease per year */,
  "lease_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the lease in years */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil on the leased land */,
  "soil_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the soil (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  "previous_crop" TEXT /* Type of crop grown on the land in the previous year */,
  "lease_terms" TEXT /* Detailed terms and conditions of the lease (e.g., water usage rights, crop restrictions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_estimations" (
  "estimation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue estimation */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farmer making the estimation */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop being evaluated */,
  "irrigation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the irrigation method used */,
  "predicted_revenue" REAL /* Predicted revenue based on the estimation parameters */,
  "revenue_deficit" REAL /* Estimated revenue deficit compared to optimal */,
  "production_loss" REAL /* Estimated production loss due to suboptimal conditions */,
  "estimation_date" TEXT /* Date when the estimation was made */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the estimation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "climate_conditions" TEXT /* Climate conditions considered in the estimation (e.g., drought, rain, normal) */,
  "pest_infestation_risk" TEXT /* Risk of pest infestation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_estimations_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_estimations_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_estimations_irrigation_id FOREIGN KEY ("irrigation_id") REFERENCES irrigation_methods ("irrigation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_rotations" (
  "rotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop rotation entry */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farmer implementing the rotation */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop being planted */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year during which the crop is planted */,
  "rotation_plan" TEXT /* Detailed plan of the crop rotation (e.g., corn -> soybeans -> wheat) */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the rotation plan (e.g., improved soil health, pest control) */,
  "soil_nutrient_changes" TEXT /* Changes in soil nutrients due to the rotation (e.g., increased nitrogen, decreased phosphorus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_rotations_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_rotations_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farmer who grew the crop */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop being produced */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the production */,
  "yield_per_acre" REAL /* Yield per acre for the crop */,
  "total_production" REAL /* Total production amount (in tons) */,
  "input_costs" REAL /* Total input costs for the production (e.g., seeds, fertilizers, labor) */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date of the harvest */,
  "quality_grade" TEXT /* Quality grade of the produced crop (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "pest_infestation" TEXT /* Level of pest infestation during production (e.g., none, minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farmer the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing analytics */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., yield analysis, financial performance, market trends) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report (e.g., main findings, recommendations) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report (e.g., farmer, agronomist) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_reports_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop whose price is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Market price of the crop on that date */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the market price data (e.g., USDA, local market) */,
  "price_trend" TEXT /* Trend of the market price (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "price_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the price change (e.g., supply and demand, weather conditions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_prices_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue trend record */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farmer */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the revenue analysis */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue earned by the farmer in that year */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income after expenses */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin (as a percentage) */,
  "investment_return" REAL /* Return on investment (ROI) for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_trends_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., farmer, agronomist, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the role */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
